actionUnits.condition: EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id: 45104963, script guid: d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) has a PersistentCall on eventID 4 (PointerClick) targeting MonoBehaviour id 45104959 (script guid: 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68, class Residential). On click, it invokes Residential.showlabel(), which updates Player/child[1] TextMeshPro to the first 20 chars of GetLabel() for Building42 ('Residential:Tora Apartment').

EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id: 45104963, script guid: d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) has a PersistentCall on eventID 4 (PointerClick). Its m_Calls target MonoBehaviour id 45104959 (script guid: 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68, class Residential) and call showlabel(). Residential.Start() uses GameObject.Find("Player") to cache Player.transform.GetChild(1) as label, so the Player (fileID: 94196998) must be active in scene. On click, showlabel() sets the Player child[1] TextMeshPro text to GetLabel().Substring(0,20) for Building42, i.e., the first 20 chars of "Residential:Tora Apartment".
